title: Ya`asuw #3299
definition:
Jaasau = "they will do"

 1) one of the descendants of Bani who took a foreign wife during the
    time of Ezra
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the descendants of Bani who took a foreign wife during the
    time of Ezra
